name: Agno
description: Agno (formerly Phidata) is a lightweight, blazing-fast Python framework for multimodal AI agents. Claims ~10,000x faster instantiation than LangGraph with ~3.75 KiB per agent. Supports 23+ model providers, multi-agent teams, built-in Agentic RAG, and 40+ tools. 20K+ GitHub stars.
oneLiner: Lightweight, blazing-fast Python framework for multimodal AI agents with model-agnostic design and multi-agent teams.
pricing: Open-source (MPL-2.0, free); Agno Cloud: Free (5 agents), Pro ($29/mo), Enterprise (custom)
capabilities: 23+ model providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Bedrock, Groq, Ollama)
Agentic RAG with multiple vector stores
Knowledge bases (PDF, URL, text, JSON, CSV)

uxAnalysis.builderFlow: Code-first Python: pip install, import Agent, configure model + tools + knowledge + memory, run. 3-5 lines for a basic agent. Teams compose agents with a leader. Agno Cloud adds web playground for testing and monitoring. Optimized for Python developers wanting max control with minimal boilerplate.
strengths: 100+ cookbook examples for diverse use cases
weaknesses: No kill switches, guardrails, or approval gates built in
Cloud is monitoring-only, not managed execution
No cost tracking or token metering
notableFeatures: Agno Cloud playground with session replay

recentDevelopments: Jan 2025: Rebranded from Phidata to Agno
2025 Q1: Published ~10,000x speed benchmarks vs LangGraph
2025: Rapid releases (multiple/week), new model providers and tools

subCriteria.name: Agent Builder UX
subCriteria.rationale: 3-5 lines of Python for a basic agent. Excellent templates. No visual builder. Under 10 min for Python devs.

subCriteria.name: Time-to-Value
subCriteria.rationale: Cloud playground with session replay. show_tool_calls for reasoning. Structured logging.

subCriteria.name: Debugging & Testing
subCriteria.rationale: Excellent docs, 100+ cookbook examples, YouTube, blog. Clear migration from Phidata.

subCriteria.name: Documentation & Learning
subCriteria.rationale: Instant: change code, re-run. No build step. Cloud playground for rapid prototyping.

subCriteria.name: Multi-Agent Coordination
subCriteria.rationale: First-class Agent Teams: coordinate (parallel), route (delegate), collaborate (sequential). Dynamic selection.

subCriteria.name: Human-in-the-Loop Design
subCriteria.rationale: Agents can consult humans via custom tools. No built-in handoff UX or evidence packets.

subCriteria.name: Workflow Templates
subCriteria.rationale: Cloud supports team workspaces. Code integrates with Git. No CI/CD pipelines.

subCriteria.name: Team Development
subCriteria.rationale: 100+ cookbook examples covering RAG, multi-agent, search, data analysis, coding, finance.

subCriteria.name: Native Connectors
subCriteria.rationale: 40+ tools: search, SQL, S3, email, Slack, GitHub. Knowledge base connectors. No enterprise ERP/CRM.

subCriteria.name: API & Protocol Standards
subCriteria.rationale: OpenAI/Anthropic tool-use. Early MCP support. No GraphQL/gRPC.

subCriteria.name: Authentication & Access
subCriteria.rationale: Basic API key. OAuth via tools. SSO on Enterprise only.

subCriteria.name: Data Pipeline & RAG
subCriteria.rationale: Strong Agentic RAG. Multiple vector stores. Document readers. Configurable chunking.

subCriteria.name: Guardrails & Kill Switches
subCriteria.rationale: No built-in kill switch or behavioral guardrails system.

subCriteria.name: Audit Trail & Compliance
subCriteria.rationale: No approval gate system. Manual HITL implementation required.

subCriteria.name: RBAC & Access Control
subCriteria.rationale: Cloud logs sessions. No tamper-proof logging or compliance certs.

subCriteria.name: Explainability & Transparency
subCriteria.rationale: Basic team/user management on paid tiers. No granular RBAC.

subCriteria.name: Deployment Flexibility
subCriteria.rationale: Deploy anywhere Python runs. Cloud is monitoring-only. Self-hosted primary. No managed execution.

subCriteria.name: Scaling & Monitoring
subCriteria.rationale: Exceptional per-agent performance. Async. Horizontal scaling is developer's responsibility.

subCriteria.name: Cost Management
subCriteria.rationale: Cloud provides session monitoring and history. No OpenTelemetry or enterprise observability.

subCriteria.name: Ecosystem Maturity
subCriteria.rationale: ~20K GitHub stars, growing fast post-rebrand. Active Discord. Developer mindshare increasing.

scoringRationale: Agno scores 62/100. Builder Experience (18) is standout — cleanest Python API, best docs, fastest iteration. Collaboration (15) strong with multi-agent teams and 100+ templates. Ecosystem (16) high innovation pace. Governance (9) and Deployment (12) need enterprise hardening.
targetUser: Python developers wanting fast, minimal agent creation

communityBuzz: Rebrand from Phidata to Agno generating fresh interest — 20K+ GitHub stars
10,000x faster instantiation benchmark gets attention but questioned methodology
Praised as cleanest Python API in the agent framework space
Seed-stage funding concerns — can they compete long-term with well-funded competitors?

walkthrough.title: How Agno Works: Build a Multimodal Agent in 5 Lines

steps.title: Install and Import
steps.description: pip install agno. Import Agent, configure your model provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Groq, Ollama — 23+ supported). A basic agent is 3-5 lines of Python with zero boilerplate.

steps.title: Add Tools and Knowledge
steps.description: Attach pre-built tools (40+ available: web search, SQL, S3, email, Slack, GitHub) and knowledge bases (PDF, URL, CSV, JSON). The agent gets Agentic RAG with intelligent retrieval and grounding.

steps.title: Configure Agent Team
steps.description: Compose multiple agents into a Team with a leader. Choose orchestration mode: coordinate (parallel execution), route (delegate to specialist), or collaborate (sequential handoff). Each agent can use a different LLM.

steps.title: Run and Observe
steps.description: Execute with agent.run() or agent.print_response(). Enable show_tool_calls to see reasoning traces. Structured outputs via Pydantic models ensure type-safe results. Async execution available for high concurrency.

steps.title: Monitor on Agno Cloud
steps.description: Connect to Agno Cloud playground for session replay, monitoring, and debugging. View conversation histories, tool call traces, and agent performance metrics. Available on Free, Pro, or Enterprise tiers.
